purpose: Define the single source of truth, read timing, write boundary, and review requirement for agent rules and knowledge.
principles: Read the registry first, then load only task-relevant rules.
Human knowledge base is primarily for people.
Agent knowledge base is primarily for agents.
Company facts file is the company fact baseline.
Known common errors are preflight inputs before risky actions.
Group and employee context files are local working memory, not official company fact sources.
Group and employee conversations are isolated by current route and identity; local filesystem readability is not authorization to read another group or employee context.

Company-material tasks must read company_sources.md, the company facts file, the Agent knowledge entry, and any necessary human knowledge-base current-version reference before answering from company files.
High-risk updates become review candidates before publication.

sources.label: Root agent rules
sources.read_when: Every framework maintenance task and high-risk connector workflow.

sources.label: Common error preflight
sources.read_when: Before risky tasks involving config/script writes, long command parameters, model capacity, context length, hidden private directories, Git publication, hooks, session repair, or pre-model connector failures.

sources.label: Common error update candidates
sources.read_when: During weekly memory compression, governance review, or after a new generic engineering/runtime failure is observed.

sources.label: Company source routing policy
sources.read_when: Before any task involving company files, product facts, sales or marketing material, SOPs, FAQs, templates, employee-readable official documents, controlled-material boundaries, or answers that should reference company files rather than model memory.

sources.label: Company fact baseline
sources.read_when: Company profile, product facts, business boundary, public-facing wording, or conflict resolution.

sources.label: Human knowledge base
sources.read_when: Employees need readable SOP, FAQ, templates, official material, reusable documentation, training, policy, or current official wording.

sources.label: Agent knowledge base
sources.read_when: Agent needs company-file retrieval maps, topic maps, task manuals, execution paths, permission checks, knowledge draft routing, or a company-material answer that should not rely only on model memory.

sources.label: Business-system security and account mapping policy
sources.read_when: Before any business-system query, intake, update, ownership assignment, export, permission debugging, allowed-conversation decision, account mapping decision, or audio/minutes business-system boundary decision.
do_not_store: customer private data outside the backend

sources.label: Worker runtime policy
sources.read_when: Before routing long-running tasks, batch jobs, file processing, reports, or scheduled automation through a worker.

sources.label: Group machine-readable profile
sources.read_when: Automation or hook needs to know allowed sends, writes, redaction, or cross-group behavior.
